Name: Difficulty 2
Des: - Starts with 4 <Icon=IconHp|30|30|0.5/>Vitality.\n- Loses an additional 2 <Icon=IconSan|30|30|0.5/>Sanity whenever Sanity decreases.\n- Increases material gained.

Name: Difficulty 3
Des:
- Starts with 3 <Icon=IconHp|30|30|0.5/>Vitality.
- Loses an additional 2 <Icon=IconSan|30|30|0.5/>Sanity whenever Sanity decreases.
- Enhances <Icon=IconDeSan|30|30|0.5/>Negative Reverbs effects.
- Randomly drops Material Growth Echo Resonance I on each floor.

- Loses an additional 4 <Icon=IconSan|30|30|0.5/>Sanity whenever Sanity decreases.

- Increases number of Abyssal Spaces on the last floor.
